Handles incoming messages from a Pebble watch and logs the message data.

# Purpose
This code listens for messages from a Pebble smartwatch using the Pebble JavaScript API. It registers an event listener for the `message` event on the `Pebble` object. When a message is received, the code logs the message data to the console with the prefix 'Message received from watch:'. This functionality is narrow, focusing specifically on handling incoming messages from a Pebble device.
